title: Mention the default --sig-proxy value for 'podman start'
body:
The --sig-proxy option has different defaults in 'podman run' and
'podman start'. Hence it's a good idea to be explicit.

Note that this is already mentioned in 'podman run --help', and was
only missing from 'podman start --help'.

Signed-off-by: Debarshi Ray <rishi@fedoraproject.org>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
I think we might just want to swap this one to be default-true instead of default-false to make it match `podman run` - I don't think there's a good reason for it to default to false

I agree the defaults should be the same.  Change variable to be a TBool.

Thanks for the reviews!

> I think we might just want to swap this one to be default-true instead
> of default-false to make it match podman run - I don't think there's a
> good reason for it to default to false

Ok, I can submit a follow up PR to switch the default to `true`.

@debarshiray Mind rebasing to pick up CI fixes?

Also, we should probably just change the default here - that way we won't have to update the documentation. I think changing the BoolFlag to a BoolTFlag should be sufficient
LGTM once tests green, nice work!
